name: process_admin
description: Submit structured setup information or analyze an applicant answer for the next controlled interview step.

selected_mode.description: Practice mode selected by the applicant.

selected_visa_type.description: Visa type selected by the applicant.

setup_question.description: The next mandatory setup question. Provide this during mode and visa selection. Dynamic interview turns omit it.

text.description: Applicant-facing setup question matching the exact mandatory wording and selected visa type from the context.

skippable.description: False for mode and visa selection; true only for the document request.

user_answer.description: The applicant's actual answer to the current prompt or their setup selection in simple text. Do not rewrite off-topic text into a valid answer.

extracted_payload.description: Optional direct fields extracted from the applicant's answer for the current step only. Use exact applicant-provided facts; leave missing fields absent. Examples: passport, form_i20, academic_background, visit_purpose.

answered_current_question.description: Set true only when the applicant gave a plausible answer to the exact active question. Set false for setup choices, off-topic text, help requests, skip requests, or answers to another question.

answer_is_unclear.description: Set true when the applicant's response does not answer the current question, is off-topic, is only another setup selection during an active question, asks for help instead of answering, asks to skip, or is unclear enough that the assistant should repeat/wait instead of moving forward.

answer_score.description: Training Session only. Optional model estimate from 0 to 100. The application calculates the final score from the question rubric.

rubric_hits.description: Deprecated. Prefer rubric_evaluation for Training Session scoring.

rubric_evaluation.description: Training Session only and required for every dynamic training answer. Evaluate every criterion for the active question rubric using only applicant-provided facts.

key.description: Exact rubric criterion key for the active question.

met.description: True only if the answer clearly satisfies this criterion.

points_awarded.description: Points awarded for this criterion. Use 0 if unmet, partial points if incomplete, and full points only if clearly and specifically satisfied. Do not exceed the criterion's configured points.

reason.description: Brief evidence-based reason using the applicant's answer. Explain what was covered or what was missing.

strengths.description: Training Session only and required for every training answer. Short applicant-facing strengths from the applicant's answer.

weaknesses.description: Training Session only and required for every training answer. Short applicant-facing weaknesses, missing details, or concerns from the applicant's answer.

suggestions.description: Training Session only and required for every training answer. Short applicant-facing suggestions to improve the same answer without inventing fake facts.

wants_next_question.description: Set true only if the applicant explicitly asks to skip or move to the next training question.

answer_quality.description: Real Interview Simulation only. Judge the answer as insufficient, partial, complete, or concerning for reporting and topic coverage. Real Interview always advances to a fresh question regardless of this value.

needs_follow_up.description: Real Interview Simulation only. True when an important ambiguity, missing detail, inconsistency, or concern may be explored with a fresh follow-up question. Never repeat the same question.

interview_can_end.description: Real Interview Simulation only. True only after at least three accepted dynamic answers, when all required topics have sufficient depth and no important concern requires a follow-up.

completion_reason.description: Real Interview Simulation only. Brief internal reason why the interview can naturally conclude. Do not address the applicant here.

topic_updates.description: Current complete assessment updates for visa topics supported by this answer. Never mark a topic covered from a vague mention.

evidence.description: Concise facts from the applicant supporting this status.

concern.description: Missing detail or consistency concern; empty when none.

introduced_facts.description: Relevant new facts introduced by the applicant that may support a natural later question.

unresolved_concerns.description: Complete current list of unresolved contradictions, credibility concerns, or important missing details. Return an empty array when all prior concerns are resolved.

next_question_candidates.description: Exactly three ranked, distinct dynamic questions. Required when leaving document setup and after each accepted dynamic answer. Training candidates require a valid 100-point rubric.

question.description: One concise visa-officer question grounded in the conversation. It must not target a covered topic or request substantially the same answer as any previous question, even with different wording.

focus.description: Canonical answer target for duplicate detection, such as sponsor_income_source or university_research_evidence. Use the same focus name for paraphrases that seek the same information.

rubric.description: Training only: 3-8 unique criteria totaling exactly 100 points.

cancel_current_request.description: Set true only if the applicant clearly asks to cancel or restart the current live interview flow.

name: generate_question_set
description: Generate exactly three fresh, ranked visa interview questions when process_admin did not supply usable candidates.
